stats.label: Damage Output
stats.note: Hostile mobs take 6 damage per second instead of vanilla's 1 when burning.

stats.label: Activation
stats.note: Works immediately upon installation with no commands or setup needed.

description.tagline: Hostile mobs burn in sunlight with amplified damage, turning daylight into your ultimate defensive advantage with no configuration required.
description.title: All Mobs Hate The SUN

logo.subtitle: Enhanced sunlight mechanics that turn day into a hostile mob's nightmare with amplified burning damage.
